purpose: Reference architecture and AI-assisted workflow patterns

description: Reusable local-first speech runtime for .NET — VAD, STT, LLM, TTS pipeline with Microsoft.Extensions.AI
purpose: Core speech pipeline that depends on ElBruno.Whisper, ElBruno.VibeVoiceTTS, ElBruno.QwenTTS, and ElBruno.LocalLLMs. Monitor for integration requirements and API contracts.

description: Local-first GitHub Copilot BYOK harness: policy-based routing between local LLMs and Azure OpenAI, launched with .NET Aspire, with explainability and live routing telemetry.
purpose: Reference implementation for local LLM routing, Aspire integration, and telemetry patterns applicable to the dashboard and ElBruno.LocalLLMs.
